prompt: A surreal architectural scene with two staircases spiraling downward on opposite sides of a large hall. On each staircase, groups of identical figures are clearly descending smoothly and confidently. However, when both staircases merge into a central platform, the combined crowd appears to be moving upward against gravity. The perspective subtly distorts to make both movements feel simultaneously correct. No text, no symbols, no numbers. Soft neutral tones, minimal lighting, slightly dreamlike atmosphere, clean geometry, impossible but believable spatial logic.
visual_logic: Separate groups move consistently downward, but when combined centrally, the overall motion reverses direction, creating an unavoidable contradiction between local and global trends.
